title: nectris peltata
intro: Nectris peltata, also known as Nasturtium, is a flowering plant of the Brassicaceae family, commonly grown for its ornamental value and edible parts. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which help to soothe skin irritations and promote wound healing. The health benefits of Nasturtium include reducing inflammation, fighting against cancer cells, and supporting the immune system due to its high content of antioxidants and vitamins. Nasturtium can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as tea, tincture, and salve, and is often used topically for skin issues or taken internally for its medicinal properties.
